module.description: Property consumables list, guest shortage reports (missing / running low), and restock tracking.
surface.host.main.title: Consumables
surface.host.main.subtitle: Define the list — guests report what is missing during the stay.
host.item.empty: Empty item — leave blank to hide
host.main.banner: Guests pick a consumable from this list and mark it missing or running low. You get an email and can mark restocked here.
host.main.catalogHelp: e.g. toilet paper, soap, coffee, dishwasher tablets… Saving replaces the full list.
host.main.seedHelp: Adds 8 usual items (FR/EN) when the list is empty.
host.main.recentHelp: Guest shortages — mark restocked after you refill.
host.main.emptyRecent.help: When a guest reports a shortage, it shows up here.
stats.title: Stock
stats.subtitle: Property consumables
stats.emptyHint: Configure the list in Modules → Consumables
home.card.title: Consumables
home.card.intro: Out of soap, paper, coffee…? Tell your host.
home.card.thanks: Thanks — your host has been notified.
home.card.empty: No consumables configured for this property.
home.card.error.title: Reporting temporarily unavailable
home.card.error.description: The list could not be loaded. Try again in a moment.
form.item.label: Consumable
form.level.label: Status
form.note.label: Note (optional)
module.status.incomplete.title: Incomplete configuration
module.status.incomplete.description: Add consumables in the host dashboard
module.status.inactive.title: Consumables module disabled
module.status.inactive.description: This module is not active on this property
